title: Now Hiring Production Engineer at Godrej Appliances Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Production Engineer at Godrej Appliances Consulting Pvt Ltd
jsonLd.description:
Godrej Appliances Consulting Pvt Ltd is actively seeking a talented and motivated Production Engineer to join our dynamic team in Coimbatore. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Godrej Appliances Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Godrej Appliances Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Project Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Godrej Appliances Consulting Pvt Ltd!
